---
title: "uplink.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\cstar\core\uplink.py"
loc: 111
complexity: 17
logic_score: 0.67
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 6.08
overall_score: 1.73
---

## Intent
The `uplink.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on clean_cli_output, extract_balanced, AntigravityUplink, __init__, send_payload, _direct_strike, make_request, query_bridge. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via clean_cli_output, extract_balanced, AntigravityUplink, __init__, send_payload, _direct_strike, make_request, query_bridge. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 101 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [tempfile](file://tempfile)
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)
- [dotenv](file://dotenv)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [urllib.request](file://urllib.request)
- [urllib.error](file://urllib.error)
- [concurrent.futures](file://concurrent.futures)

### Exports
- `clean_cli_output`
- `extract_balanced`
- `AntigravityUplink`
- `__init__`
- `send_payload`
- `_direct_strike`
- `make_request`
- `query_bridge`
